issue.title: api.mumuglobal.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://api.mumuglobal.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fapi.mumuglobal.com%2F) ### Comment > ||api.mumuglobal.com^, a block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer can't be installed, it shows, "Server connection timeout", because of the blocked functional endpoint, api.mumuglobal.com. > > Related issue report of blocking api.mumuglobal.com on Hagezi DNS blocklist, https://github.com/hagezi/dns-blocklists/issues/2336, mentioned the same issue. > > Additionally, I wanted to report another issue caused by a block rule, detailed here: > > ||store-api.mumuglobal.com^, another block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer app store's contents can't be loaded, it shows "Loading failed", because of the blocked functional endpoint, store-api.mumuglobal.com. > > Both domains mentioned function as functional endpoints. Those domains are also blocked on Easylist, having the same issues. ### Screenshots

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: www.tbsradio.jp

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body: The rule is a CSP filter, so even that is not mandatory.

issue.title: www.tbsradio.jp

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://api.mumuglobal.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fapi.mumuglobal.com%2F) ### Comment > ||api.mumuglobal.com^, a block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer can't be installed, it shows, "Server connection timeout", because of the blocked functional endpoint, api.mumuglobal.com. > > Related issue report of blocking api.mumuglobal.com on Hagezi DNS blocklist, https://github.com/hagezi/dns-blocklists/issues/2336, mentioned the same issue. > > Additionally, I wanted to report another issue caused by a block rule, detailed here: > > ||store-api.mumuglobal.com^, another block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer app store's contents can't be loaded, it shows "Loading failed", because of the blocked functional endpoint, store-api.mumuglobal.com. > > Both domains mentioned function as functional endpoints. Those domains are also blocked on Easylist, having the same issues. ### Screenshots

issue.title: myshows.me

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: Cannot reproduce
labels.description: Filters devs cannot reproduce this issue

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

labels.name: A: Waiting for data
labels.description: Waiting for more information from the user

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://myshows.me/profile/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmyshows.me%2Fprofile%2F) ### Comment > зареган на сайте. > захожу по ссылке https://myshows.me/profile/ , сайт переходит на https://myshows.me/profile/#released, страница загружается, показывает ошибку "что-то пошло не так" и начинает бешено и бесконечно перезагружаться раз в секунду, регулярно показывая ошибку "что-то пошло не так". После временного отключения adguard и загрузки рекламы сайт некоторое время загружается и работает нормально (может быть, до устаревания рекламы в каком-то кэше?), а потом (допустим, через день) всё начинается опять. > Ссылка на видео https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cQxcuOKvwdKlNMUUmmscrzbrLQV978vw/view?usp=sharing ``` Username: @evil-raider ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/tnt6gd74qv400gk8o4sgk0o48o0ok48noe7jcnj2og.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/9ka678dl8ug4c04o4go80wowk8wow0chvprj4okke0.png?nc=1)

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://myshows.me/profile/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmyshows.me%2Fprofile%2F) ### Comment > зареган на сайте. > захожу по ссылке https://myshows.me/profile/ , сайт переходит на https://myshows.me/profile/#released, страница загружается, показывает ошибку "что-то пошло не так" и начинает бешено и бесконечно перезагружаться раз в секунду, регулярно показывая ошибку "что-то пошло не так". issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://api.mumuglobal.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fapi.mumuglobal.com%2F) ### Comment > ||api.mumuglobal.com^, a block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer can't be installed, it shows, "Server connection timeout", because of the blocked functional endpoint, api.mumuglobal.com. > > Related issue report of blocking api.mumuglobal.com on Hagezi DNS blocklist, https://github.com/hagezi/dns-blocklists/issues/2336, mentioned the same issue. > > Additionally, I wanted to report another issue caused by a block rule, detailed here: > > ||store-api.mumuglobal.com^, another block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer app store's contents can't be loaded, it shows "Loading failed", because of the blocked functional endpoint, store-api.mumuglobal.com. > > Both domains mentioned function as functional endpoints. Those domains are also blocked on Easylist, having the same issues. ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://myshows.me/profile/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmyshows.me%2Fprofile%2F) ### Comment > зареган на сайте. > захожу по ссылке https://myshows.me/profile/ , сайт переходит на https://myshows.me/profile/#released, страница загружается, показывает ошибку "что-то пошло не так" и начинает бешено и бесконечно перезагружаться раз в секунду, регулярно показывая ошибку "что-то пошло не так". После временного отключения adguard и загрузки рекламы сайт некоторое время загружается и работает нормально (может быть, до устаревания рекламы в каком-то кэше?), а потом (допустим, через день) всё начинается опять. > Ссылка на видео https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cQxcuOKvwdKlNMUUmmscrzbrLQV978vw/view?usp=sharing ``` Username: @evil-raider ``` ### Screenshots

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
>Wait, reproduced only on a fresh new tab. Reloading the page and then no problem again.

The same on my end. It seems that in a new tab on the first load a CSP rule is not applied and it probably happens on other websites as well.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://map.naver.com/p?c=15.00,0,0,0,adh&p=G8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg,161.84,10,90,0,0,Float](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmap.naver.com%2Fp%3Fc%3D15.00%2C0%2C0%2C0%2Cadh%26p%3DG8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg%2C161.84%2C10%2C90%2C0%2C0%2CFloat) ### Comment > 언제부턴가 해당 확장프로그렘이 켜져있을때 > 네이버지도에서 로드뷰를 보려고하면 화면이 멈추고 스크린샷과같이 오류가 뜹니다. > 사이트를 새로고침하거나 해당 프로그램을 비활성화를 하면 정상작동됩니다. > > 처음에는 로드뷰를 쓰기 어려울만큼 버벅임과 로드뷰 화질저화등이 발생했는데 > 이 확장프로그램에서 몇가지 설정 변경 후 화질개선과 버벅거림은 없어졌지만 > 첫 실행시 오류가 뜨는건 바뀌지않아요. > 네이버지도 로드뷰 관련 프로그램을 차단하는거같은데 수정부탁드립니다. ### Screenshots

Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/li7hxnx6q1skcck4s8kkk0wcwkg044wctxta2icodw.png?nc=1)

AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://api.mumuglobal.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fapi.mumuglobal.com%2F) ### Comment > ||api.mumuglobal.com^, a block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer can't be installed, it shows, "Server connection timeout", because of the blocked functional endpoint, api.mumuglobal.com. > > Related issue report of blocking api.mumuglobal.com on Hagezi DNS blocklist, https://github.com/hagezi/dns-blocklists/issues/2336, mentioned the same issue. > > Additionally, I wanted to report another issue caused by a block rule, detailed here: > > ||store-api.mumuglobal.com^, another block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer app store's contents can't be loaded, it shows "Loading failed", because of the blocked functional endpoint, store-api.mumuglobal.com. > > Both domains mentioned function as functional endpoints. Those domains are also blocked on Easylist, having the same issues. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/mu4al4lads04w08448wk4c8gck80wkk3vmkrnpqbyu.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/e6mptebjo9kcck44c8kwc0og4c8kwwcbdilfdqlwjw.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/22o7g95gledc008ooookw008gwososwr3e30o4a5io.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v8.0.0 nightly 51 (5515) System version: | `Windows 11 Pro 252H` Browser: | Not browser, MuMuPlayer emulator AdGuard driver: | WFP Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.description: Waiting for more information from the user

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://api.mumuglobal.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fapi.mumuglobal.com%2F) ### Comment > ||api.mumuglobal.com^, a block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer can't be installed, it shows, "Server connection timeout", because of the blocked functional endpoint, api.mumuglobal.com. > > Related issue report of blocking api.mumuglobal.com on Hagezi DNS blocklist, https://github.com/hagezi/dns-blocklists/issues/2336, mentioned the same issue. > > Additionally, I wanted to report another issue caused by a block rule, detailed here: > > ||store-api.mumuglobal.com^, another block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer app store's contents can't be loaded, it shows "Loading failed", because of the blocked functional endpoint, store-api.mumuglobal.com. > > Both domains mentioned function as functional endpoints. Those domains are also blocked on Easylist, having the same issues. ### Screenshots

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#inbox](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmail.google.com%2Fmail%2Fu%2F0%2F%23inbox) ### Comment > With AdGuard enabled, Gmail website either takes an eternity to load (40+ seconds), or simply hangs in the loading screen forever. Refreshing the page doesn't help, but temporarily pausing AdGuard protection instantly fixes all issues. > > I'm NOT using the new AdGuard Mail Tracking Protection, but the issue seems to have started happening around the same time it was publicly revealed. Trying to open the website with the browser's dev console open shows a script request to local.adguard.org hanging indefinitely, only after the browser consider the request as failed that the website resumes loading, and sometimes this simply doesn't happen (triggering the permanent hang I described earlier). ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#inbox](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmail.google.com%2Fmail%2Fu%2F0%2F%23inbox) ### Comment > With AdGuard enabled, Gmail website either takes an eternity to load (40+ seconds), or simply hangs in the loading screen forever. Refreshing the page doesn't help, but temporarily pausing AdGuard protection instantly fixes all issues. > > I'm NOT using the new AdGuard Mail Tracking Protection, but the issue seems to have started happening around the same time it was publicly revealed. Trying to open the website with the browser's dev console open shows a script request to local.adguard.org hanging indefinitely, only after the browser consider the request as failed that the website resumes loading, and sometimes this simply doesn't happen (triggering the permanent hang I described earlier). ### Screenshots

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://map.naver.com/p?c=15.00,0,0,0,adh&p=G8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg,161.84,10,90,0,0,Float](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmap.naver.com%2Fp%3Fc%3D15.00%2C0%2C0%2C0%2Cadh%26p%3DG8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg%2C161.84%2C10%2C90%2C0%2C0%2CFloat) ### Comment > 언제부턴가 해당 확장프로그렘이 켜져있을때 > 네이버지도에서 로드뷰를 보려고하면 화면이 멈추고 스크린샷과같이 오류가 뜹니다. > 사이트를 새로고침하거나 해당 프로그램을 비활성화를 하면 정상작동됩니다. > > 처음에는 로드뷰를 쓰기 어려울만큼 버벅임과 로드뷰 화질저화등이 발생했는데 > 이 확장프로그램에서 몇가지 설정 변경 후 화질개선과 버벅거림은 없어졌지만 > 첫 실행시 오류가 뜨는건 바뀌지않아요. > 네이버지도 로드뷰 관련 프로그램을 차단하는거같은데 수정부탁드립니다. ### Screenshots

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: Add tracking redirect bypass rules for clk.tradedoubler.com

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

URLs from clk.tradedoubler.com are affiliate tracking redirects that wrap the
actual destination in a URL-encoded `url=` query parameter, routing users
through TradeDoubler's servers before reaching the target page.

Example tracking URL:
https://clk.tradedoubler.com/click?p=272943&a=2395583&epi=1c003m2qmhspc&epi2=dealabs&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mediamarkt.be%2Ffr%2Fproduct%2F_kobo-e-reader-libra-colour-wit-2130270.html

Expected destination:
https://www.mediamarkt.be/fr/product/_kobo-e-reader-libra-colour-wit-2130270.html

### Proposed solution

Using $urltransform rules to decode the URL-encoded destination and redirect directly,
following the same pattern already used for digidip.net:
```
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/%3A/:/
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/%2F/\//
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/%3F/?/
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/%3D/=/
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/^https?:\/\/(?:[a-z0-9-]+\.)*?.*\.tradedoubler\.com.*[?&]url=([^&]*).*/\$1/
```

### Additional information

Tested and working. TradeDoubler is a major European affiliate network used by
many deal/coupon sites (Dealabs, etc.), so this would benefit a large number of users.

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://api.mumuglobal.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fapi.mumuglobal.com%2F) ### Comment > ||api.mumuglobal.com^, a block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer can't be installed, it shows, "Server connection timeout", because of the blocked functional endpoint, api.mumuglobal.com. > > Related issue report of blocking api.mumuglobal.com on Hagezi DNS blocklist, https://github.com/hagezi/dns-blocklists/issues/2336, mentioned the same issue. > > Additionally, I wanted to report another issue caused by a block rule, detailed here: > > ||store-api.mumuglobal.com^, another block rule from AdGuard Base filter, and AdGuard DNS filter causing an issue. The issue that I encounter is that MuMuPlayer app store's contents can't be loaded, it shows "Loading failed", because of the blocked functional endpoint, store-api.mumuglobal.com. > > Both domains mentioned function as functional endpoints. issue.title: Add tracking redirect bypass rules for clk.tradedoubler.com

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

URLs from clk.tradedoubler.com are affiliate tracking redirects that wrap the
actual destination in a URL-encoded `url=` query parameter, routing users
through TradeDoubler's servers before reaching the target page.

Example tracking URL:
https://clk.tradedoubler.com/click?p=272943&a=2395583&epi=1c003m2qmhspc&epi2=dealabs&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mediamarkt.be%2Ffr%2Fproduct%2F_kobo-e-reader-libra-colour-wit-2130270.html

Expected destination:
https://www.mediamarkt.be/fr/product/_kobo-e-reader-libra-colour-wit-2130270.html

### Proposed solution

Using $urltransform rules to decode the URL-encoded destination and redirect directly,
following the same pattern already used for digidip.net:
```
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/%3A/:/
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/%2F/\//
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/%3F/?/
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/%3D/=/
||clk.tradedoubler.com/click?*url=$urltransform=/^https?:\/\/(?:[a-z0-9-]+\.)*?.*\.tradedoubler\.com.*[?&]url=([^&]*).*/\$1/
```

### Additional information

Tested and working. TradeDoubler is a major European affiliate network used by
many deal/coupon sites (Dealabs, etc.), so this would benefit a large number of users.

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: m.bild.de

labels.name: A: By Design
labels.description: The issue cannot be resolved due to technical, ethic, or legal reasons

issue.body:
## Information

### Deutsch

Sehr geehrte Benutzerin, sehr geehrter Benutzer, aufgrund von Gesetzen ([z. B. die Gerichtsentscheidung in Karlsruhe, Deutschland im Jahre 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html)) ist es leider nicht möglich diese Paywall (Adblock-Erkennung) zu umgehen. Vielen Dank für Ihr Verständnis.

### English

Dear user, due to a court decision ([eg the court ruling in Karlsruhe, Germany in 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html) ) it is unfortunately not possible to bypass this paywall (adblock detection). Thank you for your understanding.
